title: Automation for renaming a group every month
excerpt: I have a board with 25 tasks and upto 25 subtasks. The only way I have found to recreate each task along with each subtask was to duplicate. I need an automation to changed the duplicated group and have not found how to …

posts.author: SandyT (Sandra Thompson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board with 25 tasks and upto 25 subtasks. The only way I have found to recreate each task along with each subtask was to duplicate. I need an automation to changed the duplicated group and have not found how to do that. Any ideas?

Sandra Thompson

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sandra,

I’d be happy to help.

Can you be more specific please? Do you want to change the group name or the task names?

Some screenshots would help!

posts.author: SandyT (Sandra Thompson)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to change the group name by removing the word duplicate. When the new group is created, the word duplicate is there. I do not want them to have to go and remove that word every month.

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t think there is a way to achieve this with monday.com automations.

You’d need to use a tool like make.com in order to make an API call.

EDIT: Here is the relevant documentation: Groups
